title: Johannes Kepler
ground_truth_corrupted_sentence: By the time Johannes was born, the Kepler family fortune had already begun to recover.
guessed_corrupted_sentence: By the time Johannes was born, the Kepler family fortune had already begun to recover.

parsed_response.corrupted_sentence: By the time Johannes was born, the Kepler family fortune had already begun to recover.
parsed_response.explanation: Historical accounts and the Wikipedia article state that by the time Johannes Kepler was born, the Kepler family's fortunes had declined and their financial situation was precarious. His father was a mercenary and the family was poor. The sentence reverses this by claiming the fortunes had begun to recover.
